:ADC rd, rs1, rs2 is opcode=0x3 & rd & rs1 & rs2 & op2=0x3

:BITH rd, ximm8 is opcode=0x13 & rd & ximm8 & rd_hi

:LDW rd, (rs1, -rs2)  is opcode=0xd & rd & rs1 & rs2 & op2=0x2
